summary: Complete testing of PDF export layout for DOEM format. All 11 backend tests passed. PDF exports are working correctly with the expected layout: ACAIACA header, two blue lines, publication info, footer with Prefeitura info, and digital signature with QR code.

layout_elements.footer_prefeitura: ✓ Present (3 lines with CNPJ, address, contact)
layout_elements.digital_signature: ✓ Present (masked CPF, validation code, QR code)

header.brasoes: Two brasões (left and right) - implemented in _draw_header
header.publication_info: ANO, Nº, PÁGINAS centered between lines
header.date: Date in Portuguese format on the right

footer.line1: Prefeitura Municipal de Acaiaca - MG | CNPJ: 18.295.287/0001-90
footer.line2: Praça Tancredo Neves, Número 35, Centro de Acaiaca - MG, CEP: 35.438-000

context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF export layout has been verified to match the DOEM format. The DOEMTemplate class in /app/backend/utils/pdf_utils.py correctly implements the header with brasões, ACAIACA text, blue lines, and footer with Prefeitura info. Digital signature with QR code is working. All PDF export endpoints (/api/pacs/{pac_id}/export/pdf, /api/public/pacs/{pac_id}/export/pdf, /api/public/processos/export/pdf) are functional.
